news-global-econ.title: Blue tsunami predictions for November election might not make landfall
news-global-econ.description: Foreign policy does matter and Trump's military actions in Iran, Venezuela and Cuba could reshape November midterm elections more than polling suggests.

news-global-econ.title: Minneapolis mayor claims Trump can just 'hire out more TSA agents' despite DHS shutdown
news-global-econ.description: Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey argued that President Donald Trump could hire more TSA agents instead of deploying ICE officers to airports despite the DHS shutdown.

news-global-econ.title: D.C. Swamp Says More White Collar Migration Is 'Sweet Spot' for Deficit Fix
news-global-econ.description:
Legislators and investor-backed advocates met in Congress last week to promote the self-serving claim that more white collar migrants - such as foreign doctors - will cut the federal government's ballooning deficit and debt.

news-global-econ.title: If Cuba falls, who steps in? Castro dynasty shadows island’s future
news-global-econ.description: As President Donald Trump signals possible action, experts say Cuba has no clear successor while Raúl Castro, 94, remains a significant influence on the communist country.

news-korea-soc.description: Neville Roy Singham and Jodie Evans funneled $278 million through network spreading pro-China propaganda, according to Fox News Digital investigation.
